metadata.description: Azure region.
Container App name (e.g. ca-elb-dashboard).
Resource id of the Container Apps Environment.
Login server for the platform ACR.
Tag of the api image in the platform ACR.
Tag of the frontend image in the platform ACR.
Tag of the terminal image in the platform ACR.
If true, all sidecars boot from a public hello-world image. Postprovision hook flips this to false via az containerapp update.
Resource id of the user-assigned managed identity shared by all sidecars.
Client id of the same UAMI (used by azure-identity inside the containers).
Principal/object id of the same UAMI (used for runtime RBAC assignments).
AAD tenant id used to validate MSAL bearer tokens.
App Registration client id (audience) for the api.
Frontend feature flag for the custom database builder. Set to false to hide menu entries and route access.
Frontend feature flag for lab tools. Set to false to hide menu entries and route access.
Frontend feature flag for the browser terminal. Set to false to hide menu entries, dashboard card, shortcuts, and route access.
App Insights connection string for telemetry from inside the containers.

Log Analytics workspace id (customerId GUID). Used by the api sidecar to KQL `ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL` for the Live Wall log tail when the historical project-local log files are not available (i.e. always, in deployment). Empty disables the LA fallback and the Live Wall log tiles stay blank.
Platform Storage account name (used to derive the table endpoint for jobstate / jobhistory access).
Resource id of the platform subnet where workload Storage private endpoints are created for api/worker/terminal access.

Resource id of the hub VNet snet-aks subnet. New AKS clusters are created in this subnet (BYO-subnet) so their nodes resolve and route to the workload Storage private endpoints intra-VNet. Empty falls back to managed-VNet mode (no Storage connectivity).
Subscription id (passed into the api/worker env vars so monitor routes can default subscription_id when not provided in the query string).
CORS allowed origins for the api ingress. Empty list disables CORS (same-origin only).
Tags applied to every resource in this module.

Shared secret used by the api / worker sidecars to authenticate with the terminal exec server (loopback :7682). Auto-rotated on every deployment via newGuid(); both sidecars receive the same Container Apps secret reference so they always agree.

ingress.corsPolicy: [if(empty(parameters('allowedOrigins')), null(), createObject('allowedOrigins', parameters('allowedOrigins'), 'allowedMethods', createArray('GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'), 'allowedHeaders', createArray('*'), 'allowCredentials', false()))]
